user.title: Climate Advisor Setup
user.description: Configure your Climate Advisor integration. Select the entities it should monitor and control.

data.outdoor_temp_entity: Outdoor Temperature Sensor (optional, falls back to weather entity)
data.indoor_temp_entity: Indoor Temperature Sensor (optional, falls back to climate entity)

sensors.title: Door & Window Sensors
sensors.description: Select any door or window contact sensors you'd like Climate Advisor to monitor. These will pause HVAC when left open.

schedule.title: Daily Schedule
schedule.description: Set your household schedule so Climate Advisor knows when to warm up, cool down, and send briefings.
